content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：神明诞生之日，今日发布～欢迎大家收听、下载及分享～如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

忘却前夜OST：神明诞生之日
她与祂，不可共存，于是一柄匕首刺入两颗心脏，那是她向神明奉上的报偿。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
规划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST: "Day of Divine Parturition" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

Morimens OST: "Day of Divine Parturition" 
She and It could not coexist. With a dagger, she drove her no into their twin hearts, an answer etched in blood.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：神明诞生之日
